passiveAbilities.name: Cutlass
passiveAbilities.description: If this model deals Slicing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

passiveAbilities.name: Ye Scurvy Dogs
passiveAbilities.description: Other friendly Goblin Pirates within 4” during the Replenish Step gain +1 energy.

activeAbilities.name: Hit
activeAbilities.description: This character’s next Melee Attack this turn deals +2 Dmg.

activeAbilities.name: Reload [Shoot Pistol]
activeAbilities.description: The named ability can be used again. This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.

arcaneAbilities.name: Shoot Pistol
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X+1 Impact Dmg.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Jolly Roger
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Damage from this attack cannot be reduced by passive abilities.
